center.name: 喀喇昆仑山脉
center.summary: 喀喇昆仑山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红腹红尾鸲，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the high mountains of the southwestern and central Palearctic in the Caucasus, Karakoram, Pamir, Himalaya, Tian Shan, and Altai, in the countries of Afghanistan, Armenia, Azerbaijan, Bhutan, China, Georgia, India, Iran, Kazakhstan, Mongolia, Nepal, Pakistan, Russia, Tajikistan, Turkmenistan, and Uzbekistan.{{cite book| editor-last = Hoyo| editor-first = J
